ds1307_begin.tooltip: Initialize DS1307 real-time clock (I2C), using global rtc object

ds1307_auto_time.tooltip: Set DS1307 clock to compile time

ds1307_set_time.message0: DS1307 Set Time Sec %1 Min %2 Hour %3 Weekday %4 Date %5 Month %6 Year %7
ds1307_set_time.tooltip: Manually set DS1307 time and date

ds1307_update.tooltip: Read all time registers from DS1307 and update cache

ds1307_get_time.tooltip: Get specified time value from DS1307 cache (must call update first)
